channel.title: LucianDavies
channel.copyright:
© 2020 Tonderai Lucian Davies Khatai

Powered by Hugo and Hugo Theme Basic.

item.title: Bootstrapping a rust project with cargo generate command
item.description: Intro Many times as with the case with trying to learn something new you find small obstacles that slow down your progress and before you know it you have abandoned your shiny new adventure. This is a common problem in software development that we have CLI’s and generators design to catapult you into the exciting bits. As much as there is a need to learn the basic process of building your project sometimes you want to just try something and see if its worth chasing.

item.title: Close encounters of the imagination kind
item.description: The story unfolds when I was much younger, definitely in the middle of primary school. Mother was working late and it was just Simba younger brother, Lingling younger sister and the house help who we shall call aunty. We were playing this game called deya and in English it translates to the singular of the space inside a curved leg. Don’t judge me these are kids games and the names reflect this.

item.title: The invisible kid
item.description: The story unfolds when I was 14 years old. I was in my second year in all boys high school. At that time is was already evident that I struggled with school. The whole idea of structured learning grated my soul. Anyhow it was 2 term and parents teacher consultations for all form 2’s pupils scheduled. The process goes something like this. After school day. Class then ending at 1pm all the parents would pitch up and meet the teachers and get a 1 on 1 update or insights into their children’s performance.

item.title: Touch Typing Quest (Intro)
item.description: Since the beginning of time I have always wanted to type really fast but with so many things to do the benefits haven’t always been clear. In the spirit of learning new things I am to attempt this quest again but this time document my efforts. As a software developer strong typing skills can be an assets despite software development being short bursts of typing instead of the long stream we see in other professions.

item.title: Touch Typing Quest (Intro)
item.description: Since the beginning of time I have always wanted to type really fast but with so many things to do the benefits haven’t always been clear. In the spirit of learning new things I am to attempt this quest again but this time document my efforts. As a software developer strong typing skills can be an assets despite software development being short bursts of typing instead of the long stream we see in other professions.

item.title: Genesis
item.description: I have been attempting to write for over a year. Lets see if it sticks The website has a simple stack underneath powered by hugo base. Didn’t want to fiddle to much otherwise you wouldn’t be reading this. It is hosted on github as a simple static website. I might consider adding a domain but only when I have reached 5 posts. Another thing I might add is a newsletter subscribe option but again I don’t need the pressure yet.

item.title: About me
item.description: Super villain seeking minions to help steal world peace. Wingman to my better other. Debugger of code.
